response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified virtual characters (Tokoyami Towa and Kaela Kovalskia). 2. Reviewed the credit list at the beginning, which mentions four songs: 'The Biggest Dreamer', 'Trust Me', 'Koi-shi-mi o yasashisa ni', and 'Memories'. 3. Carefully audited the audio throughout the video and determined it is entirely instrumental; no vocal tracks are being performed. 4. Concluded that no vocal songs are present, and therefore marked 'contains_vocal_music' as false for all segments and set all song-related metadata to null. 5. Created chronological scenes based on the visual changes in the performance.
response.global_summary: A dance performance video featuring virtual characters (Tokoyami Towa and Kaela Kovalskia). The video includes instrumental background music and a concluding message from the creator. Despite credits listing several songs, only an instrumental track is heard, and no vocal music is present.

scenes.description: Two virtual characters (Tokoyami Towa and Kaela Kovalskia) perform a choreographed dance. The audio consists entirely of instrumental music.
One virtual character (Kaela Kovalskia) performs a solo dance. The audio remains an instrumental track.
A virtual character posing on a sofa next to a mascot. Text overlays display a personal message to the viewer. The audio is the same instrumental track as before.
